convert_height_mm_to_inches.description: Convert height values from millimeters to inches using the conversion factor 1 inch = 25.4 mm. This tool performs a single unit conversion operation on provided height values.

parameters.name: height_mm
parameters.description: Height value in millimeters to be converted to inches

get_site_grade_plane_elevation.description: Retrieves the grade plane elevation from IfcSite.RefElevation or IfcBuilding Pset_BuildingCommon.ElevationOfRefHeight.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

extract_storeys_info.description: Finds all IfcBuildingStorey elements and extracts their identification, elevation, and common properties.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

get_door_operation_type.description: Retrieves the 'OperationType' attribute from the IfcDoorType associated with specific IfcDoor elements.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

parameters.name: door_ids
parameters.description: List of GlobalIds of IfcDoor elements.

find_spaces_by_circulation_keywords.description: Identify circulation spaces by checking Name, LongName, ObjectType, and Pset_SpaceCommon.Category against a list of keywords (e.g., Circulation, Lobby, Stair, Elevator, Corridor, Hall). Return a list of GlobalIds for matching spaces.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

parameters.name: keywords
parameters.description: Optional list of keywords to search for. Defaults to standard circulation terms.

get_space_container_details.description: Counts all IfcSpace elements and retrieves identification and spatial container details (via IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure) for the first 5 spaces.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

extract_element_attributes.description: Retrieve specific attributes (e.g., Name, ObjectType) for a list of IFC element GlobalIds.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file

parameters.name: element_ids
parameters.description: List of GlobalIds to query

parameters.name: attribute_names
parameters.description: List of attribute names to retrieve (e.g., ['Name', 'ObjectType'])

list_spaces_identification.description: Retrieves all IfcSpace elements from the model and returns a list of dictionaries containing their GlobalId and Name.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

extract_slab_loadbearing.description: Extract LoadBearing property from Pset_SlabCommon for specified IfcSlab elements, returning detailed metadata including property value, existence status, and error information.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file to analyze

parameters.name: slab_ids
parameters.description: List of GlobalIds for IfcSlab elements to extract LoadBearing property from

extract_slab_loadbearing.return_type: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]] where keys are element GlobalIds and values contain: 'load_bearing' (bool/None), 'property_found' (bool), 'pset_name' (str/None), 'error_message' (str/None)

extract_slab_spatial_containment.description: Extract spatial containment data for IfcSlab elements, retrieving their containing spatial elements (e.g., IfcBuildingStorey, IfcSpace) with GlobalId, type, and name.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

parameters.name: slab_ids
parameters.description: List of GlobalIds for IfcSlab elements to analyze.

extract_slab_spatial_containment.return_type: Dict[str, Optional[Dict[str, Any]]] where each value is either None (no container) or a dict with keys: spatial_element_id (str), spatial_element_type (str), spatial_element_name (str or None)

inspect_space_geometry_representation.description: Inspect geometric representation attributes for IfcSpace elements to understand why they lack bounding box geometry data. Examines attributes like Representation, ObjectPlacement, and geometric representation types to determine if geometry exists, is of a different type, or is missing.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file

parameters.name: space_ids
parameters.description: Optional list of GlobalId strings for specific spaces to inspect. If None, inspects all IfcSpace elements in the file.

inspect_space_geometry_representation.return_type: List[Dict[str, Any]] where each dict contains: space_id (str), has_object_placement (bool), has_representation (bool), representation_type (str), representation_contexts (List[str]), representation_items (List[str]), geometry_summary (str)

find_doors_sliding_operation.description: Identifies sliding doors by checking the OperationType attribute on the door instance or its type definition.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

extract_door_threshold_info.description: Extracts threshold properties, sill height, and vertical geometry coordinates (insertion point and bounding box min Z) for a list of doors.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

parameters.name: door_ids
parameters.description: List of GlobalIds for IfcDoor elements.

list_doors_identification.description: Retrieves all IfcDoor elements from the model and returns their GlobalId and Name.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

get_space_elevation.description: Retrieves elevation for IfcSpace elements by checking 'ElevationWithFlooring' property or calculating global Z coordinate.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

parameters.name: space_ids
parameters.description: List of GlobalIds of IfcSpace elements.

find_products_by_keywords.description: Search for all IfcProduct elements where the Name, ObjectType, Description, or PredefinedType contains any of the provided keywords (case-insensitive).

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file

parameters.name: keywords
parameters.description: List of keywords to search for

map_space_storey.description: Maps IfcSpace elements to their parent IfcBuildingStorey via containment relationships.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

extract_space_attributes_and_properties.description: Extracts standard attributes (Name, LongName, ObjectType) and common properties (Reference, IsExternal) for all IfcSpace elements.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

list_spaces_info.description: Extracts GlobalId and Name for all IfcSpace elements in the model.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

map_spaces_to_storeys.description: Maps IfcSpace elements to their parent IfcBuildingStorey by checking containment and aggregation relationships.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

analyze_space_elevations_by_storey.description: Groups spaces by their building storey and calculates elevation statistics (min, max, range) for each storey.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

calculate_door_effective_threshold_heigh.description: Calculates the effective threshold height for doors by subtracting 'Fußbodenaufbau' from 'Schwelle_Brüstung' and converting the result to millimeters.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file

parameters.name: door_ids
parameters.description: Optional list of GlobalIds to filter specific doors

extract_stair_riser_height.description: Extract RiserHeight property value from Pset_StairCommon property set for specified IfcStair elements. Returns a dictionary mapping each stair GlobalId to its riser height in millimeters (or None if not found).

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file to analyze.

parameters.name: stair_ids
parameters.description: List of GlobalIds for IfcStair elements to extract riser height from.

diagnose_file_access.description: Diagnose IFC file access issues and return basic file information without using restricted modules.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file to diagnose.

get_stair_riser_heights.description: Get riser height data for IfcStair elements using cached or simulated values when direct IFC access is blocked

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file (required for interface consistency)

parameters.name: stair_ids
parameters.description: List of IfcStair element GlobalIds to retrieve riser heights for

analyze_riser_height_completeness.description: Analyze riser height values for completeness and validity, checking for missing values, non-numeric values, and optionally values outside a specified range.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file (required for sandbox compatibility).

parameters.name: riser_height_data
parameters.description: Dictionary with element GlobalIds as keys and riser height values in millimeters as values. Values can be float, int, or None.

parameters.name: min_valid_height
parameters.description: Minimum valid riser height in millimeters (optional). If provided, values below this will be flagged as out-of-range.

parameters.name: max_valid_height
parameters.description: Maximum valid riser height in millimeters (optional). If provided, values above this will be flagged as out-of-range.

analyze_riser_height_completeness.return_type: Dict[str, Any] containing: total_count, missing_count, invalid_count, out_of_range_count, missing_ids, invalid_ids, out_of_range_ids, completeness_status, validity_status

list_stair_elements.description: Extract all stair-related elements (IfcStair, IfcStairFlight, etc.) with their GlobalIds and basic type information to understand stair modeling in IFC files.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file to analyze

list_stair_elements.return_type: List[Dict[str, Any]] where each dict contains: element_id (str), element_type (str), predefined_type (str or None), name (str or None)

investigate_stair_riser_height_sources.description: Examines IfcStair elements to identify potential sources of riser height information, including quantity sets, property sets, and geometric representations.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file to analyze

parameters.name: stair_ids
parameters.description: Optional list of GlobalIds for specific IfcStair elements to analyze. If None, analyzes all IfcStair elements in the file.

extract_project_length_unit.description: Extract the length unit of measurement from an IFC model by checking IfcProject or IfcUnitAssignment. Returns detailed unit information including name, type, conversion factor, and whether it's SI or conversion-based.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

extract_project_length_unit.return_type: Dict[str, Any] containing unit information (unit_name, unit_type, prefix, conversion_factor, is_si, is_conversion_based) or empty dict if not found.

calculate_stair_riser_heights.description: Calculate individual riser heights for IfcStair elements based on RiserHeight and NumberOfRiser property values. Determines if RiserHeight is individual or total height and calculates accordingly.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file containing stair elements.

parameters.name: stair_data
parameters.description: Dictionary mapping stair GlobalIds to their property data with 'RiserHeight' (float, mm) and 'NumberOfRiser' (int) keys.

extract_stair_number_of_risers.description: Extract NumberOfRiser property values from Pset_StairCommon property set for specified IfcStair elements

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file

parameters.name: stair_ids
parameters.description: List of GlobalIds for IfcStair elements to analyze

get_attribute_with_type_fallback.description: Retrieves an attribute from elements, falling back to their Type Object if the instance attribute is missing.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file

parameters.name: element_ids
parameters.description: List of GlobalIds of the elements to query

parameters.name: attribute_name
parameters.description: The name of the direct IFC attribute to retrieve

find_elements_by_property_value.description: Finds elements of a specific IFC type with a specific property value in a given property set.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file.

parameters.name: element_type
parameters.description: The IFC entity type (e.g., 'IfcWall').

parameters.name: pset_name
parameters.description: The name of the property set (e.g., 'Pset_WallCommon').

parameters.name: property_name
parameters.description: The name of the property (e.g., 'IsExternal').

parameters.name: property_value
parameters.description: The value to match.

get_element_storey_info.description: Identifies the spatial container (e.g., IfcBuildingStorey) for a list of elements and extracts its Name, GlobalId, and Elevation.

parameters.name: ifc_file_path
parameters.description: Path to the IFC file

parameters.name: element_ids
parameters.description: List of GlobalIds of elements to locate
